#+TITLE: The Preamble Test
#+AUTHOR: Test Writer

* Characters
|-------+-------------------------------|
| ALICE | A curious girl                |
| BOB   | Her neighbour, a quiet fellow |
|-------+-------------------------------|

* Outline
Two neighbours meet in a garden and discuss the weather.

* ACT I
** Scene 1: The Garden
*** A sunny garden. Morning.
**** ALICE
Good morning.
**** BOB
Is it.
